result.stdout:
Description:
  UnityCtl Bridge - WebSocket bridge between CLI and Unity Editor

Usage:
  UnityCtl.Bridge [options]

Options:
  --project <project>  Path to Unity project root (optional, will auto-detect if not specified)
  --port <port>        Port to listen on (0 for automatic) [default: 0]
  --version            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  UnityCtl Bridge - WebSocket bridge between CLI and Unity Editor

Usage:
  UnityCtl.Bridge [options]

Options:

  --port <port>        Port to listen on (0 for automatic) [default: 0]
  --version            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information
